summary: Final launch round validated end-to-end. Backend: 12/12 launch tests + 5/5 dropi regression tests green. Frontend: public Funnel, VIP capture, /app operator gate, login, Copilot ZYNEX layer (mascot ring + glow, .btn-cta-grad), 4 quick cards, new sidebar nav (Import/Productos/Leads VIP), Products page with 2 seeded cards, VIP admin table + export, and 3 back-compat redirects all pass.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/vip.py::update_lead accepts a raw dict for patch (no Pydantic model). Consider a VipLeadPatch model to constrain fields and improve OpenAPI docs.
routes/vip.py::export_leads emits an xlsx even when zero rows, using a fake blank record — cleaner UX would be to 404 or return an empty sheet with headers only.

routes/products.py::_promo_matches uses AND-token matching that will match unrelated haystacks if pattern has few tokens (e.g. pattern 'COLCHA SABANA KING 600' vs a haystack containing all these tokens for a different product); best_promo is chosen by longer pattern length, which is a reasonable heuristic but may still misfire on edge cases — consider adding a `priority` field on Promotion.
vip public endpoint has no rate limit — the public /api/vip-leads POST is exposed with no captcha/throttle; recommend adding a simple IP-based throttle or hCaptcha to prevent lead spam in production.

The Funnel VIP form defaults pais='Colombia' and pedidos='50-200/semana' via Radix Select; the test flow relies on those defaults. This is fine, but the submit button should probably disable until required fields are validated (currently allows submission even if user clears the country).
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral VIP leads prefixed 'TEST_' and a 'TEST_ProductX' product; both are deleted at test end. A few TEST_UI leads may persist from the Playwright run (visible in /app/vip-leads) — safe to ignore or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All launch-round specs from iteration_6 are green. Radix Select components (vip-pais, vip-pedidos) require .click() to open + .click() on the item, not select_option — they have sensible defaults so playwright can just leave them. Prompt-vars promo matching verified against an existing Protector combo order (db9869a0…) returning promo_name='Protector Antifluido Premium', promo_price=99000.
